ballpark_pal.description: One of the smaller outfields in MLB . Relies on tall fences to keep home runs from getting out of hand. The most wind-receptive venue outside of Wrigley.

weather.description: One of the smaller outfields in MLB . Relies on tall fences to keep home runs from getting out of hand. The most wind-receptive venue outside of Wrigley.

ballpark_pal.description: A horizontal-shaped outfield with taller-than-average fences. Shallow to center field and deep to the corners . A 16-foot wall covers most of the right-field gap, compensating for how close it is at parts.

weather.description: A horizontal-shaped outfield with taller-than-average fences. Shallow to center field and deep to the corners . A 16-foot wall covers most of the right-field gap, compensating for how close it is at parts.

ballpark_pal.description: The smallest outfield in MLB, offset partially by a taller left-field wall . Stadium architecture dampens the effect from wind but hot days can turn GABP into a home run paradise .

weather.description: The smallest outfield in MLB, offset partially by a taller left-field wall . Stadium architecture dampens the effect from wind but hot days can turn GABP into a home run paradise .

ballpark_pal.description: A large, symmetrical outfield with deep corners and gaps . The center field fence is a few feet closer than the MLB standard.

weather.description: A large, symmetrical outfield with deep corners and gaps . The center field fence is a few feet closer than the MLB standard.

ballpark_pal.description: The most wind-receptive venue in baseball (by a lot). Out-blowing wind tends to correlate with warmer temperatures , and vice versa. The Corners are very deep and guarded by 16-foot-tall-fences . An extremely shallow porch in left-center makes for a cheap home run target.

weather.description: The most wind-receptive venue in baseball (by a lot). Out-blowing wind tends to correlate with warmer temperatures , and vice versa. The Corners are very deep and guarded by 16-foot-tall-fences . An extremely shallow porch in left-center makes for a cheap home run target.

ballpark_pal.description: A retractable roof venue with a zig-zag outfield. The left side is particularly deep while the right is better primed for homers .

weather.description: A retractable roof venue with a zig-zag outfield. The left side is particularly deep while the right is better primed for homers .

ballpark_pal.description: A retractable-roof venue with strict rules for allowing an open roof. A one-of-a-kind shape with a particularly shallow left-field fence. Plays deep to center and short to right .

weather.description: A retractable-roof venue with strict rules for allowing an open roof. A one-of-a-kind shape with a particularly shallow left-field fence. Plays deep to center and short to right .

ballpark_pal.description: The highest MLB altitude outside of Coors. Large outfield to accommodate longer carry distance on fly balls. Massive 25-foot center field fence .

weather.description: The highest MLB altitude outside of Coors. Large outfield to accommodate longer carry distance on fly balls. Massive 25-foot center field fence .

ballpark_pal.description: The temporary home of the Athletics. Highly receptive to the usual out-blowing wind , often pairing with the consistent Summer heat . Features a spacious outfield with a tiny right-field fence . Standard to the corners and center, bowed outward in the gaps .

weather.description: The temporary home of the Athletics. Highly receptive to the usual out-blowing wind , often pairing with the consistent Summer heat . Features a spacious outfield with a tiny right-field fence . Standard to the corners and center, bowed outward in the gaps .

ballpark_pal.description: A symmetrical outfield with a highly consistent wind pattern (out to right-center). Plays deep down the lines and particularly shallow to center field.

weather.description: A symmetrical outfield with a highly consistent wind pattern (out to right-center). Plays deep down the lines and particularly shallow to center field.
